title: Warm congratulations to Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Tianhui Group, for winning the "2019 Quality Customer Award" from National Energy Group
contentHtml:
Warm congratulations to Tianhui Group

Qinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd.

Won the National Energy Group's "2019 Quality Customer Award》

On December 10, the "2019 National Major Customer Symposium" hosted by the Sales Branch of China Shenhua Coal-to-Liquids Chemical Co., Ltd., a national energy group, was officially held in Hangzhou.

Tianhui Group Chairman Zeng Shengwen and assistant Li Nan were invited to attend the meeting. During this meeting, the group'sQinhuangdao Hengjie Plastic Co., Ltd.won《2019 Quality Customer Award》Chairman Zeng Shengwen said that he was very honored that Hengjie Plastics had achieved great results in the sales industry in the past 2019, and said that the group will continue to work hard to provide customers with a variety of choices and live up to the trust of its partners.combinefor a win-win situation, make progress together,Forge ahead in the plastics sales industry!
titleZh: 热烈祝贺天晖集团旗下秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司荣获国家能源集团《2019年度优质客户奖》
contentHtmlZh:
热烈祝贺天晖集团旗下

秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司

荣获国家能源集团《2019年度优质客户奖》

12月10日，由国家能源集团——中国神华煤制油化工有限公司销售分公司主办的《2019年度全国主力客户座谈会》于杭州正式举行。

天晖集团董事长曾胜文协同助理李楠受邀参会，此次会议中，集团旗下秦皇岛市恒捷塑料有限公司荣获《2019年度优质客户奖》董事长曾胜文表示非常荣幸在过去的2019年里恒捷塑料在销售行业再创佳绩，并表示集团将继续努力，为客户提供多种选择，不辜负合作伙伴的重托，合作共赢，共同进步，在塑料销售行业奋勇前行！
